summary: Draft PR #2760 attempted a one-line decomp matching change in src/melee/gr/grheal.c, replacing GET_GROUND(gobj) with direct gobj->user_data access in grHeal_8021F0D8. The PR was closed unmerged, with maintainer feedback that the author was working from a three-month-old commit and that grheal had already been finished.

key_files.role: Only changed file; one-line local access change in grHeal_8021F0D8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grHeal_8021F0D8 changed Ground* gp = GET_GROUND(gobj); to Ground* gp = gobj->user_data;

what_changed.description: In grHeal_8021F0D8, initialized Ground* gp from gobj->user_data instead of GET_GROUND(gobj).
PR body identified the work as pending matches, but did not provide matching rationale or verifier output.
A bot report for GALE01 stated 'No changes' for base 2e8e958 to head 96f6893.
Maintainer issue comment said the branch was based on a three-month-old commit, 0559a4e28d8b019445e5ceab0a52490cd5de3e56, and that grheal had already been finished.

smart_moves.text: The PR was scoped narrowly to a single expression in one function, making the attempted match change easy to review.

decomp_lessons.text: Before submitting pending match work, rebase or compare against current master so already-finished files are not reworked from stale source.
A one-line accessor or field-access change without rationale or verifier evidence is weak evidence for a reusable decomp tactic, especially when the PR is closed as stale.

naming_conventions.text: The local variable name gp was used for a Ground* in grHeal_8021F0D8.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Attempted to alter codegen or matching by replacing the GET_GROUND(gobj) macro/helper form with direct gobj->user_data field access.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.text: The contributor was working from an old commit, and grheal had already been finished.

follow_up_queries: closed unmerged stale branch grheal already finished

notes: The actual code diff is very small and fully visible.
There are no review comments and no detailed author rationale beyond 'Pending Matches'.
The bot report says 'No changes' despite the raw diff showing a one-line source diff; this may reflect comparison/report behavior rather than absence of a Git diff.
The PR was closed with merged_at null in raw_pr_json, so no acceptance or final source state should be inferred.
Because maintainer feedback says grheal was already finished, the direct user_data access should not be promoted as an accepted local convention from this PR alone.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Check current master before submitting pending match work
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2760 was closed after feedback that it was based on a three-month-old commit and the touched grheal work had already been finished. Curators may index this as a workflow caution for stale pending-match branches.

rejection_notes.text: Do not promote 'replace GET_GROUND(gobj) with gobj->user_data' as a global standard or path fact from this PR; the change was in a closed unmerged stale PR and lacks matching rationale.
Do not infer reviewer preference against GET_GROUND from the available feedback; the only maintainer comment addresses stale branch state and already-finished grheal work.
